mapper.insert: insert into agent_run_step(run_id, sequence_no, step_type, display_name, status, summary, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{runId}, #{sequenceNo}, #{stepType}, #{displayName}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from agent_run_step where run_id=#{runId} order by sequence_no
select coalesce(max(sequence_no), 0) + 1 from agent_run_step where run_id=#{runId}
mapper.update: update agent_run_step set status='CANCELLED', finished_at=sysdate(), update_time=sysdate() where run_id=#{runId} and status in ('PENDING','RUNNING')
